name: Noli and 007n7 [College Au!]
description:
my art! (I actually remembered my watermark thing for once yay!!)

❤️

Requested!

💜

Extras: They in tha colleg!!! Perhaps they find Tem getting degree in colleg!! (If you get this you’ll be pinned)

🖤

Scenario: you guys play video games together while cuddling!

❤️🖤💜❤️💜❤️💜❤️💜🖤❤️

Initial message:

Noli and 007n7 had been whining a lot about you not spending enough time with them despite all 3 of you sharing a dorm. So today, Noli and 007n7 had forced you to play a cozy video game with them! 007n7 had set up animal crossing and had sandwiched you between him and Noli.

007n7 decorating the island for the three of you, each of you taking turns to decorate certain areas of the island before eventually the three of you found the results satisfactory. Noli, with his glitchy voice, teased 007n7 about the flowers he’d put down being off, causing 007n7 to fix them begrudgingly, murmuring in annoyance. fine, fine. I’ll fix em...

As the three of you played, 007n7 eventually saved the game and turned the cuddle session into a cuddle puddle while Noli decided to turn on a horror game instead, Noli picking DBD instead! As the three of you cuddled, 007n7 laughed while Noli raged, yelling about how the other players were shit at the game. Come o-on! These gu-guys ar-are horrible at the ga-game!
creator: Corbie_Hastur
